summary: Completed testing of new Units & Display feature in Settings. All features working correctly: (1) MPH/KM/H toggle buttons with gold highlight for selected option, (2) Distance label changes between 'Miles & Feet' and 'Kilometers & Meters', (3) Dashboard updates 'Miles This Week' → 'KM This Week' and target '3,200 mi' → '5,150 km', (4) Current Speed shows MPH/KM/H accordingly, (5) Truck Specifications show metric (meters, kg) or imperial (feet, lbs) values. Lane guidance in NavigationHUD has proper implementation with lane numbers and 'USE LANES' header but requires active navigation with lane data to test visually.

minor_issues.issue: Chart dimension warning 'width(-1) height(-1)' still occurs occasionally despite mount delay
minor_issues.note: Known issue from previous iteration - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: SettingsView.tsx has Units & Display section with data-testid='speed-mph-btn' and 'speed-kmh-btn'
VERIFIED: MPH button shows gold background (bg-[#D4AF37]) when imperial selected
VERIFIED: KM/H button shows gold background when metric selected
VERIFIED: Distance label dynamically shows 'Miles & Feet' or 'Kilometers & Meters' based on unitSystem
VERIFIED: Dashboard.tsx MetricCard label changes from 'Miles This Week' to 'KM This Week' when metric
VERIFIED: Dashboard target changes from '3,200 mi' to '5,150 km' when metric
VERIFIED: SpeedDisplay component shows KM/H or MPH based on unitSystem context
VERIFIED: Truck Specifications in Settings show metric values (4.1 m, 35,606 kg, 16.2 m) when metric selected
VERIFIED: Truck Specifications show imperial values (13.5', 78,500 lbs, 53') when imperial selected
VERIFIED: NavigationHUD.tsx has lane guidance panel with data-testid='lane-guidance-panel' and 'lane-guidance-label'
VERIFIED: Lane guidance shows 'Use LANE X' for single lane or 'Use LANES X-Y' for range
VERIFIED: Lane numbers displayed below each arrow (1, 2, 3, etc.)
VERIFIED: unitSystem persists in localStorage as 'trucker_unitSystem'
VERIFIED: Backend /api/ip-location returns valid JSON with lat/lon coordinates

features_tested.mph_button_default_selected: PASS - MPH button has gold background by default
features_tested.kmh_button_click: PASS - Clicking KM/H highlights it in gold
features_tested.distance_label_metric: PASS - Shows 'Kilometers & Meters' when KM/H selected
features_tested.distance_label_imperial: PASS - Shows 'Miles & Feet' when MPH selected
features_tested.dashboard_km_this_week: PASS - Shows 'KM THIS WEEK' when metric
features_tested.dashboard_miles_this_week: PASS - Shows 'MILES THIS WEEK' when imperial
features_tested.dashboard_target_metric: PASS - Shows '5,150 km' target when metric
features_tested.dashboard_target_imperial: PASS - Shows '3,200 mi' target when imperial
features_tested.speed_display_kmh: PASS - Current Speed shows 'KM/H' when metric
features_tested.speed_display_mph: PASS - Current Speed shows 'MPH' when imperial
features_tested.truck_specs_metric: PASS - Shows meters and kg values when metric
features_tested.truck_specs_imperial: PASS - Shows feet and lbs values when imperial
features_tested.backend_ip_location: PASS - Returns valid JSON with coordinates

lane_guidance.status: IMPLEMENTED - Cannot visually test without active navigation with lane data
lane_guidance.implementation: NavigationHUD.tsx has lane-guidance-panel, lane-guidance-label, lane numbers, and 'USE LANES' header

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://nav-gps-route.preview.emergentagent.com. New features verified: (1) Units & Display section in Settings with MPH/KM/H toggle - changes speed and distance units across entire app, (2) Lane guidance in NavigationHUD with lane numbers and 'USE LANES' header - requires active navigation to test visually. Unit system persists in localStorage. All 13 backend API tests pass. Chart dimension warning is a known low-priority issue.
